description_long: This object is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, pointed blade and a symmetrical design. The blade is slender and tapers to a sharp tip, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The crossguard is straight and extends horizontally, providing hand protection and balance. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be of uniform thickness, ending in a faceted pommel for counterweight and grip security. The entire object is rendered in a dark, metallic color, suggesting it is made primarily of steel or iron. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and functional appearance.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a pointed blade, straight crossguard, and simple cylindrical handle, all in a dark metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and handle with symmetrical proportions.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's narrowness.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the straight blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and straight geometry of the sword.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle with faceted pommel, metallic finish
